## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Rapyd and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance metrics, and operational updates.](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is conducting an audit week next week, pausing content production temporarily](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [SEO performance for Rapyd content is showing positive trends, with improvements in keyword rankings](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - [Rapyd team to review content clusters and prioritize future topics, potentially including referral partnerships](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Several minor content and technical adjustments identified for ongoing optimization](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1772.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX Audit Week

  - [Next week (June 16-20) GrowthX will pause content production for an internal audit](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=45.0)
  - [Audit goals: transition to new platform, analyze content performance, optimize AI workflows, conduct QA](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=64.0)
  - [Content production will resume after the audit week](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=120.0)

### SEO Performance Update

  - [8 new articles published recently (4 last Thursday, 4 on Monday)](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=404.0)
  - [Potential issues with Google Search Console data in Looker reports identified](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=423.0)
  - [SEMrush report shows improvements: 30 keywords improved in position, 2 new keywords in top 3](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=439.0)
  - Notable ranking: "What is PIX?" now ranking \#1 and appearing in AI overviews
  - [Currently tracking 216 keywords for Rapyd-GrowthX collaboration](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=806.0)

### Content Strategy Discussion

  - [Current focus on three clusters: payment processing, niche payments, cross-border payments](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1300.0)
  - [Considering expansion into new clusters or deepening existing ones](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1334.0)
  - [Potential new cluster suggested: referral partnerships (how to become a partner, sell Rapyd, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1511.0)
  - [Discussion on creating specialized content for LLM searches, even without obvious keywords](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)

### Technical and Content Adjustments

  - [URL slugs in XML files need adjustment (use slug from Airtable, not full title)](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=250.0)
  - [Errors to watch for: remove mentions of smart payment routing, update "100+ countries" to "worldwide"](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1822.0)
  - [XML file updates needed: add topic as plain text, use correct contact URL for blogs](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1911.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Aida to follow up with Jacob regarding LLM-optimized content strategy](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=941.0)
  - [Mark to share document with Rachel detailing common content errors to address](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1796.0)
  - [Rapyd team to discuss and decide on future content cluster priorities](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [GrowthX to implement technical adjustments in XML files and content creation process](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1972.0)
  - [Rapyd to provide more detailed audience information to help with keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/Fkj5HjsxsSr1J_mTDn25sgYsL_Jcj4Ff?tab=summary&timestamp=1680.0)
